description:
OpenTelemetry traces in ClickHouse (otel.otel_traces). Uses PMM-provisioned datasources **ClickHouse-OTEL** (default database `otel`) and **Metrics** (VictoriaMetrics/Prometheus). Assumes: Timestamp (DateTime/DateTime64), Duration in nanoseconds, SpanAttributes as Map (use JSON functions if your column is String). Adjust StatusCode / SpanKind literals if your exporter normalizes differently.

Overview counts use $__timeFilter(Timestamp): they are totals inside the dashboard time range only (not monotonic all-time counters).

The Traces panel uses the official Grafana ClickHouse datasource trace mode (queryType traces, format 3)—the same pattern as Percona’s opentelemetry-clickhouse dashboard—not Tempo/Jaeger. Set Trace ID from the top variable or click a TraceId in the tables below. If your table has no ResourceAttributes column, edit the Traces panel SQL and replace the serviceTags expression with CAST([], 'Array(Map(String, String))') AS serviceTags.

panels.description: Number of span rows with Timestamp in the selected dashboard time range. Compare to “Distinct traces” to see average spans per trace. Not a cumulative counter unless your query ignores the time filter.

targets.rawSql: SELECT count() AS value FROM otel.otel_traces WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp)

panels.title: Spans in time range

panels.description: Distinct TraceId values in the selected time range. Useful with “Spans in time range” for spans-per-trace; shrink the range to see if load is bursty vs steady.

targets.rawSql: SELECT uniqExact(TraceId) AS value FROM otel.otel_traces WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp)

panels.title: Distinct traces (time range)

panels.description: Count of error-status spans in the time range. Use the panel link to jump to the error table; click TraceId there to load the Traces panel.

targets.rawSql: SELECT countIf(StatusCode IN ('Error', 'STATUS_CODE_ERROR')) AS value FROM otel.otel_traces WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp)

panels.title: Error spans (time range)

panels.description: Share of spans that are errors within the selected time range.

targets.rawSql: SELECT if(count() = 0, 0, 100.0 * countIf(StatusCode IN ('Error', 'STATUS_CODE_ERROR')) / count()) AS value FROM otel.otel_traces WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp)

panels.title: Error span % (time range)

panels.description: Interactive service topology from recording-rule metrics with synchronized ClickHouse trace table. Click an edge to see traces.
panels.title: Service Map

panels.description: Click a point → context menu (or tooltip) → data link sets dashboard time to a 2m window centered on that point and scrolls to “Spans in dashboard time range” below. TraceId column there opens the Traces panel.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(Timestamp, INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS t,
  count() / $__interval_s AS spans_per_sec
FROM otel.otel_traces
WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp)
GROUP BY t
ORDER BY t WITH FILL STEP $__interval_s

panels.title: Span throughput (approx. /s)

panels.description: Uses the dashboard time picker. After drilling from throughput, the range is ~2 minutes; otherwise it follows whatever range you selected. Limit 200 rows.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  Timestamp,
  TraceId,
  SpanId,
  ServiceName,
  SpanName,
  StatusCode,
  Duration / 1000000 AS duration_ms
FROM otel.otel_traces
WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp)
ORDER BY Timestamp DESC
LIMIT 200

panels.title: Spans in dashboard time range (throughput drill-down)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(Timestamp, INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS t,
  quantile(0.5)(Duration / 1000000) AS p50_ms,
  quantile(0.95)(Duration / 1000000) AS p95_ms,
  quantile(0.99)(Duration / 1000000) AS p99_ms
FROM otel.otel_traces
WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp)
GROUP BY t
ORDER BY t WITH FILL STEP $__interval_s

SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(Timestamp, INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS t,
  countIf(StatusCode IN ('Error', 'STATUS_CODE_ERROR')) / $__interval_s AS errors_per_sec
FROM otel.otel_traces
WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp)
GROUP BY t
ORDER BY t WITH FILL STEP $__interval_s

SELECT ServiceName AS metric, count() AS value
FROM otel.otel_traces
WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp)
GROUP BY ServiceName
ORDER BY value DESC
LIMIT 15

SELECT SpanName AS metric, count() AS value
FROM otel.otel_traces
WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp)
GROUP BY SpanName
ORDER BY value DESC
LIMIT 15

SELECT
  SpanKind,
  count() AS spans,
  quantile(0.95)(Duration / 1000000) AS p95_ms,
  countIf(StatusCode IN ('Error', 'STATUS_CODE_ERROR')) AS errors
FROM otel.otel_traces
WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp)
GROUP BY SpanKind
ORDER BY spans DESC

panels.description: Service map built from trace parent->child edges in ClickHouse. Edge stats show calls, RPS, p95 latency, and error rate. This view does not include eBPF TCP bytes/connectivity; add rr_connection_* metrics from VictoriaMetrics for that.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  id,
  id AS title
FROM (
  SELECT coalesce(nullIf(ServiceName, ''), '(unknown)') AS id
  FROM otel.otel_traces
  WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp)

  UNION DISTINCT

  SELECT coalesce(
    nullIf(trim(BOTH '"' FROM toString(SpanAttributes['peer.service'])), ''),
    '(external)'
  ) AS id
  FROM otel.otel_traces
  WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp)
    AND (
      positionCaseInsensitive(SpanKind, 'CLIENT') > 0
      OR SpanKind IN ('SPAN_KIND_CLIENT', 'Client', '3')
    )
)
WHERE id != ''
LIMIT 1000

SELECT
  concat(source, '→', target) AS id,
  source,
  target,
  sum(calls) AS mainstat,
  round(sum(weighted_p95_ms_numer) / greatest(toFloat64(sum(calls)), 1), 2) AS detail__p95_ms,
  round(100.0 * sum(errors) / greatest(toFloat64(sum(calls)), 1), 2) AS detail__error_pct,
  sum(calls) AS detail__calls,
  if(sum(errors) > 0, 'red', 'green') AS color
FROM (
  SELECT
    coalesce(nullIf(parent.ServiceName, ''), '(unknown)') AS source,
    coalesce(nullIf(child.ServiceName, ''), '(unknown)') AS target,
    count() AS calls,
    quantile(0.95)(child.Duration / 1000000) AS p95_ms,
    countIf(child.StatusCode IN ('Error', 'STATUS_CODE_ERROR')) AS errors,
    quantile(0.95)(child.Duration / 1000000) * count() AS weighted_p95_ms_numer
  FROM otel.otel_traces AS child
  INNER JOIN otel.otel_traces AS parent
    ON child.TraceId = parent.TraceId
   AND child.ParentSpanId = parent.SpanId
   AND parent.SpanId != ''
  WHERE $__timeFilter(child.Timestamp)
  GROUP BY source, target
  HAVING source != target

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    coalesce(nullIf(ServiceName, ''), '(unknown)') AS source,
    coalesce(nullIf(trim(BOTH '"' FROM toString(SpanAttributes['peer.service'])), ''), '(external)') AS target,
    count() AS calls,
    quantile(0.95)(Duration / 1000000) AS p95_ms,
    countIf(StatusCode IN ('Error', 'STATUS_CODE_ERROR')) AS errors,
    quantile(0.95)(Duration / 1000000) * count() AS weighted_p95_ms_numer
  FROM otel.otel_traces
  WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp)
    AND (
      positionCaseInsensitive(SpanKind, 'CLIENT') > 0
      OR SpanKind IN ('SPAN_KIND_CLIENT', 'Client', '3')
    )
  GROUP BY source, target
  HAVING source != target
)
GROUP BY source, target
ORDER BY sum(calls) DESC
LIMIT 500

panels.title: Service map (trace-based)

panels.description: Connection edges from recording rules. This panel is Prometheus/VictoriaMetrics-backed and uses rr_connection_* metrics.

targets.expr:
label_replace((
  label_replace(sum by (app_id) (rr_connection_l7_requests), "id", "$1", "app_id", "(.*)")
  OR
  label_replace(sum by (destination) (rr_connection_l7_requests), "id", "$1", "destination", "(.*)")
), "title", "$1", "id", "(.*)")

panels.title: Service map (recording rules)

panels.description: Edge drilldown. Set by clicking an edge in either map panel.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  Timestamp,
  TraceId,
  ServiceName,
  SpanName,
  StatusCode,
  Duration / 1000000 AS duration_ms,
  coalesce(
    nullIf(trim(BOTH '"' FROM toString(SpanAttributes['peer.service'])), ''),
    nullIf(trim(BOTH '"' FROM toString(SpanAttributes['server.address'])), ''),
    nullIf(trim(BOTH '"' FROM toString(SpanAttributes['net.peer.name'])), ''),
    nullIf(trim(BOTH '"' FROM toString(SpanAttributes['net.peer.ip'])), ''),
    ''
  ) AS target
FROM otel.otel_traces
WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp)
  AND ('${edge_source}' = '' OR ServiceName = '${edge_source}')
  AND ('${edge_target}' = '' OR target = '${edge_target}' OR ServiceName = '${edge_target}')
ORDER BY Timestamp DESC
LIMIT 200

panels.title: Edge drilldown (traces)

panels.description: Uses SpanAttributes as Map. If SpanAttributes is JSON String, replace with JSONExtractString(SpanAttributes, 'server.address').

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  ServiceName AS client_service,
  coalesce(nullIf(trim(BOTH '"' FROM toString(SpanAttributes['server.address'])), ''), nullIf(trim(BOTH '"' FROM toString(SpanAttributes['net.peer.name'])), ''), '(internal)') AS peer,
  count() AS calls,
  quantile(0.95)(Duration / 1000000) AS p95_ms
FROM otel.otel_traces
WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp)
  AND (
    positionCaseInsensitive(SpanKind, 'CLIENT') > 0
    OR SpanKind IN ('SPAN_KIND_CLIENT', 'Client', '3')
  )
GROUP BY client_service, peer
ORDER BY calls DESC
LIMIT 50

panels.title: Client spans → peer (server.address / net.peer.name)

panels.description: Requires db.system in SpanAttributes. If using JSON column, use JSONHas / JSONExtractString instead of mapContains.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  coalesce(nullIf(trim(BOTH '"' FROM toString(SpanAttributes['db.system'])), ''), '(unknown)') AS db_system,
  coalesce(nullIf(trim(BOTH '"' FROM toString(SpanAttributes['db.name'])), ''), '') AS db_name,
  count() AS spans,
  quantile(0.95)(Duration / 1000000) AS p95_ms,
  countIf(StatusCode IN ('Error', 'STATUS_CODE_ERROR')) AS errors
FROM otel.otel_traces
WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp)
  AND mapContains(SpanAttributes, 'db.system')
GROUP BY db_system, db_name
ORDER BY spans DESC
LIMIT 40

panels.title: Database client spans (db.system / db.name)

panels.description: Native Grafana Traces visualization fed by ClickHouse (grafana-clickhouse-datasource queryType=traces). Enter Trace ID above or click a TraceId in the tables below. duration is ns→ms via multiply(Duration, 1e-6).

targets.rawSql:
WITH '${trace_id}' AS trace_id
SELECT
  TraceId AS traceID,
  SpanId AS spanID,
  ParentSpanId AS parentSpanID,
  ServiceName AS serviceName,
  SpanName AS operationName,
  Timestamp AS startTime,
  multiply(Duration, 0.000001) AS duration,
  arrayMap(key -> map('key', key, 'value', toString(SpanAttributes[key])), mapKeys(SpanAttributes)) AS tags,
  arrayMap(key -> map('key', key, 'value', toString(ResourceAttributes[key])), mapKeys(ResourceAttributes)) AS serviceTags
FROM otel.otel_traces
WHERE trace_id != ''
  AND TraceId = trace_id
  AND $__timeFilter(Timestamp)
ORDER BY Timestamp ASC
LIMIT 1000

panels.title: Trace (ClickHouse → Traces panel)

panels.description: Click TraceId to set the dashboard variable and load the trace in the Traces panel above.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  TraceId,
  max(Duration) / 1000000 AS max_span_ms,
  sum(Duration) / 1000000 AS sum_span_ms,
  count() AS span_count,
  anyHeavy(ServiceName) AS sample_service,
  anyHeavy(SpanName) AS sample_span
FROM otel.otel_traces
WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp)
GROUP BY TraceId
ORDER BY max_span_ms DESC
LIMIT 40

panels.title: Slowest traces (by max span duration)

panels.description: Click TraceId to load that trace in the Traces panel (same datasource, queryType traces).

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  Timestamp,
  TraceId,
  SpanId,
  ServiceName,
  SpanName,
  StatusCode,
  Duration / 1000000 AS duration_ms
FROM otel.otel_traces
WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp)
  AND StatusCode IN ('Error', 'STATUS_CODE_ERROR')
ORDER BY Timestamp DESC
LIMIT 100

panels.title: Recent error spans

title: OTEL traces — ClickHouse (otel.otel_traces)
